name: DNS Provider Migration
description: Migrate DNS hosting from one provider to another (e.g., Route53, Cloudflare, etc.)

template.description: Migrating DNS hosting from {{currentProvider}} to {{targetProvider}} for {{domainCount}} domains with {{recordCount}} total DNS records. Migration includes zone file export/import, nameserver updates at registrar, TTL reduction, and validation of all record types (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.).
template.currentState: DNS hosted on {{currentProvider}} for {{domainCount}} domains. {{recordCount}} DNS records including A, CNAME, MX, TXT records. Current TTL values: 3600 seconds. DNSSEC not enabled. No health checks or failover routing.
template.proposedState: DNS migrated to {{targetProvider}} with all {{recordCount}} records. TTL reduced to 300 seconds before migration. Nameservers updated at domain registrar. DNSSEC enabled. Health checks configured for critical endpoints. Geolocation routing for global traffic.
template.trafficPatterns: Production domains serving global traffic. Critical for website, email (MX records), and API endpoints. DNS queries: ~100,000/day. Zero downtime requirement. Email delivery must not be interrupted. SSL certificate validation via DNS (TXT records).
